allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in \(''access_token'',''refresh_token'',''consumer_secret''\)}\)")
Bash(conda run -n venv python3 -c "from yahoo_oauth import OAuth2; import inspect; print\([a for a in dir\(OAuth2\) if ''token'' in a.lower\(\) or ''access'' in a.lower\(\)]\)")
